vi-√5. vas P. -vasati, to change an abode, depart from (abl.),  BhP. ;
(with brahmacaryam), to enter upon an apprenticeship, become a pupil,  ChUp. ;
to abide, dwell, live,  MBh. ;  R. ;
to pass, spend (time),  ib.  &c.:
Caus. -vāsayati, to cause to dwell apart, banish, expel,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to send forth, dismiss,  MBh.

vivas
I. 1 P.
1 To dwell abroad.
2 To live, dwell.
3 To spend, pass (time).

II. 2 A.
1 To exchange clothes.
